name: American Declaration of Independence
summary: The Thirteen American Colonies declared independence from Great Britain, marking the birth of the United States and a major turning point in world history.

name: Battle of Long Island
summary: The British army defeated American forces in the largest battle of the American Revolutionary War, securing control of New York City.

name: Battle of Trenton
summary: George Washington led a surprise attack against Hessian forces, boosting American morale and revitalizing the Revolutionary cause.

name: Publication of Adam Smith's 'The Wealth of Nations'
summary: Adam Smith published his influential work laying the foundations of modern economics and advocating free-market principles.

name: Captain James Cook Begins Third Voyage
summary: Captain James Cook set sail on his third voyage, aiming to find the Northwest Passage and further explore the Pacific region.

name: Spanish Consolidation of Alta California Missions
summary: Spain strengthened its presence in Alta California, expanding missions and settlements to secure its northern frontier in the Americas.

name: Foundation of San Francisco Presidio
summary: Spanish forces established the Presidio of San Francisco, marking the beginning of European settlement in the region.
